name: Why Is the Frog Like That
text:
Frog do be flying. (It cannot be blocked by creatures that are also, on some level, confused.)
Whenever you cast your feelings, scry your soul, then draw a conclusion.
This card is legal in every format in which it is not banned, which is, regrettably, none of them.
flavorText: the frog knows. the frog has always known. ask it nothing.
